parents.subject: LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: remove legacy mount support

commit.subject: LU-17000 nodemap: Fix errors reported by coverity
commit.message:
LU-17000 nodemap: Fix errors reported by coverity

This patch fixes errors reported by coverity related to nodemap:

1. Do not dereference NULL pointer for "fset"
CoverityID: 487127 ("Null pointer dereference")

2. In mgs_llog_fileset_cleanup(), do not pass tainted expression
"lcfg_in->lcfg_buflens" to "lustre_cfg_string", which uses it as an
offset.
CoverityID: 487122 ("tainted value as argument")

Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5c2e5d660f912ad115656fbd33ff3bb1e18318b8
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60776
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
